sections.paragraph: only found in pl. const. בְּלֹואֵי Jer 38:12, and contr. בְּלֹוֵי ver. 11 Jer 38:11, therags of worn out clothes. This latter form which should be pronounced bĕlפvê is prop. from the sing. בְּלֹו for בְּלֹוו; in other copies however (see J. H. Michaelis) it is read בְּלֹויֵיִ and in editt. בְּלֹויֵ (of the form גֹּוָיִיִ גֶֹּויִיִ), from the sing. בְּלֹוי (of the form אֲבֹוי).
